query:
ALTER TABLE approvalTasks 
MODIFY COLUMN assignedVia ENUM('direct', 'role', 'group', 'shift', 'delegation', 'escalation', 'send_back', 'clarification_response') NOT NULL,
MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'need_clarification', 'info_requested', 'reassigned', 'expired', 'skipped', 'sent_back', 'pending_clarification', 'clarification_provided') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
MODIFY COLUMN decision ENUM('approved', 'rejected', 'info_requested', 'need_clarification', 'sent_back');
